title: Little House on the Prairie season 3 and beyond would be a 'dream come true' for one Netflix star — and we can even guess season storylines way before they're renewed
summary: Season 2 is going to be even better. We skipped past the first two books by the time season 1 even began, with season 2 confirmed to adapt On the Banks of Plum Creek .
